_source: AmberTools dat/antechamber/PARMCHK.DAT (GAFF, AmberTools25). EQUA = equivalent atom types (penalty 0). CORR = corresponding atom types with substitution penalties. Columns transcribed: bond = bl (bond-length penalty), angle = ba, angle_ctr = cba (angle-center penalty), torsion = tor. -1 means 'use default'. Penalty weights/defaults below are the PARMCHK.DAT WEIGHT_*/DEFAULT_* values.
